raw_title: Reality Re-Imag(in)ed. Mapping Publics’ Perceptions and Evaluations of AI-Generated Images in News Contexts
title_en: Reality Re-Imag(in)ed. Mapping Publics’ Perceptions and Evaluations of AI-Generated Images in News Contexts
title_zh: 现实再想象：公众对新闻语境中AI生成图像的感知与评价映射
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了公众如何看待和评价新闻中使用的AI生成图像。它调查了人们对这些图像的真实性、可信度和影响的看法，以及这些看法如何影响他们对新闻的理解。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how the public perceives and evaluates AI-generated images used in news. It investigates people's views on the authenticity, credibility, and impact of these images, and how these views affect their understanding of news.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字新闻中AI生成视觉内容的公众接受度、伦理影响和媒体信任问题。
research_direction_en: Investigating public acceptance, ethical implications, and media trust regarding AI-generated visual content in digital journalism.
